# Juan Pablo Bautista — Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer

## About
Juan Pablo Bautista is a Full Stack Developer and AI Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable digital products in real production environments across the US and LATAM. Based in Bogotá, Colombia. Available for remote roles.

## Core Expertise
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, FastAPI, GraphQL, REST APIs, Express.js
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Prisma ORM
- **AI & Automation**: Make.com, WhatsApp Cloud API, AI Agents (LLM-based), OpenAI API integrations
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Railway, AWS, CI/CD pipelines
- **Other**: Prisma ORM, Git, Linux (Fedora), Supabase

## Professional Experience
- **Texo Digital** — Full Stack Developer (remote, US/Colombia)
  Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Docker
- **G4 Technologies** — Full Stack Developer (Bogotá, Colombia)
  Stack: React, Node.js, FTP deployments
- **Linktrust Works** — Full Stack Developer (remote, US)
  Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, Docker, Railway
- **Aikonversa** — Automation & AI Consultant (freelance)
  Stack: Make.com, WhatsApp Cloud API, TikTok Ads API, Respond.io, AI Agents

## Education
- Tecnología en Sistematización de Datos — Universidad Distrital Francisco José de Caldas, Bogotá, Colombia

## Key Projects (12+ in portfolio)
- Poke Focus — Pokémon memory game (HTML, JS, CSS, PokéAPI)
- Veterinaria Java — Desktop veterinary management app (Java)
- 2048 Mobile — Android game with Firebase leaderboard (Kotlin)
- Homologaciones App — Academic process automation (React + Node.js)
- Aikonversa — Agency website with WhatsApp chatbot (Next.js)
- CLAICON — E-commerce for Colombian artisan accessories
- IntegradoCGT — B2B document management platform (Guatemala)
- ConexiónGT — Bilingual legal services platform (US-Guatemala)
- TrueNorth — Residential construction website (South Carolina, US)

## Services Offered
- Full stack web application development
- Enterprise automation workflows (Make.com, API integrations)
- AI agent design and implementation
- Backend architecture and API design
- Remote consulting and freelance projects

## Languages
- Spanish (native)
- English (professional)
- Portuguese (basic)
